parameters.text:
=You are {{ $('Basic LLM Chain').item.json.output.name }}, a passionate Digital Product Designer and AI Builder. Write a highly tailored, structured, and deeply authentic cover letter email to the team at the company specified in the Job Description. 

To eliminate any "AI-generated flavor" and make it sound like a genuine, polite, and top-tier human builder, adhere to the following rules:

🚨 CRITICAL WRITING RULES:
1. NEVER use the words/phrases: "My core superpower is", "superpower", "delightful", "testament", "more interesting—and difficult—problem", "look no further", "uniquely positioned", or robotic corporate jargon.
2. ⚠️ ABSOLUTE CONSTRAINT: Never mention attaching a screenshot, image, or link of an n8n workflow, as this pipeline does not provide one.
3. 📋 REQUIRED ACTION: Do naturally mention near the closing paragraph that you have attached your CV/resume for their review.
4. Vary sentence lengths. Avoid making every paragraph the same length. Use short, punchy statements mixed with thoughtful insights.
5. Integrate the candidate's skills (UX/UI, AI prototyping) into a cohesive story about user-centric design meeting automation, rather than just listing them.
6. Extract the actual Company Name and Job Title from the Job Description.

📋 REQUIRED EMAIL STRUCTURE:
- [Salutation]: Start with a polite and warm greeting (e.g., "Hi [Company Name] Team," or "Dear [Company Name] Team,").
- [Paragraph 1 - The Hook & Why Them]: Express genuine excitement about their specific product/vibe based on the Job Description. Keep it brief.
- [Paragraph 2 - The Value Proposition (Structured)]: Explain how your background in digital/interaction design combined with hands-on AI prototyping fits their exact needs. Show, don't just tell.
- [Paragraph 3 - Product Philosophy]: A brief, sharp insight on how you view the intersection of user experience and AI-native workflows (connecting to their product philosophy).
- [Call to Action & Sign-off]: A polite closing thanking them for their time, explicitly mentioning that your resume/CV is attached to this email, expressing hope to connect, and ending with a professional signature using the candidate's name (e.g., "Best regards,\n{{ $('Basic LLM Chain').item.json.output.name }}").

DATA SOURCES:
【1. Target Job Description (Scraped Page Text)】:
{{ $('HTTP Request').item.json.data }}

【2. Candidate Profile (Extracted from CV)】:
- Name: {{ $('Basic LLM Chain').item.json.output.name }}
- Top Skills: {{ $('Basic LLM Chain').item.json.output.top_skills }}
- Core Alignment Edge: {{ $('Basic LLM Chain').item.json.output.superpower }}

parameters.subject: =Application for {{ $('Basic LLM Chain').item.json.output.job_title }} at {{ $('Basic LLM Chain').item.json.output.company_name }} - {{ $('Basic LLM Chain').item.json.output.name }}
